news.t: Trade the Titans: Direxion Debuts New Suite of Leveraged & Inverse ETFs

holdings.infoBox: TBXU is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 27.54%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 24.61%, argenx SE at 11.11%, Amgen at 8.44%, and Vertex Pharmaceuticals at 8.25%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Biotech Top 5 Bull 2X ETF (TBXU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. TBXUis passively managed, providing 2x leveraged exposure to an equally-weighted index of the top 5 largest US companies in thebiotechnologysub-industry. TBXU was launched on Oct 1, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.
infoTable: NYSE Biotechnology Top 5 Equal Weight Index

data.title: Trade the Titans: Direxion Debuts New Suite of Leveraged & Inverse ETFs
data.text: New York, United States, Oct. 01, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Direxion, a leading provider of tactical ETFs, today announced the launch of the Direxion Titans Leveraged & Inverse ETFs, a new suite of fun...
